extraction.title: Control what content is extracted for translation

extractAll.title: Extract all key/string pairs
extractAll.description: Extract all key/string pairs; when disabled, no key/string pairs are extracted

pathRules.title: Extraction rules
pathRules.description: Regex matching keys for which values are extracted (overrides extraction exceptions)

includeIsolatedStrings.title: Extract strings without associated key
includeIsolatedStrings.description: Extract stand-alone strings that have no associated key

excludeKeys.title: Key exception pattern
excludeKeys.description: Regular expression matching keys to except from the extraction rule

subfilterRules.title: Sub-filter rules
subfilterRules.description: Regex matching keys for which values should be processed with the sub-filter

keys.title: Configure how JSON keys map to text unit identification

useAsName.title: Use the key as the resname
useAsName.description: Use the JSON key as the resource name (resname) in the extracted translation unit

useFullPath.title: Use the full key path
useFullPath.description: Use the full path of nested keys as the resource name

leadingSlash.title: Include leading "/" on key path
leadingSlash.description: Include a leading slash on the full key path used as the resource name

useIdStack.title: Use the full path of IDs for resname and TextUnit Metadata

idRules.title: ID rules
idRules.description: Regex matching keys which are IDs (resname in XLIFF), overrides "use key as resname"

noteRules.title: Note rules
noteRules.description: Regex matching keys that are notes, values appear as <note> in XLIFF

metaRules.title: Generic metadata rules
metaRules.description: Regex matching keys for which values are added as TextUnit Metadata

maxwidthRules.title: Maxwidth rules
maxwidthRules.description: Regex matching keys that are numbers, extracted as maxwidth property in XLIFF

x-groups.label: Control what content is extracted for translation
Configure how JSON keys map to text unit identification

enabled.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
enabled.description: Enable pattern-based detection of inline codes

mergeAdjacent.title: Merge Adjacent Codes
mergeAdjacent.description: Merge consecutive inline codes into a single placeholder

moveBoundaryCodes.title: Move Boundary Codes
moveBoundaryCodes.description: Move codes at segment boundaries to the skeleton

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns for inline code detection

rules.title: Patterns
rules.description: List of regex patterns to detect inline codes

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: Regex pattern for inline code detection

sample.title: Sample Text
sample.description: Sample text to test patterns against

useAllRulesWhenTesting.title: Test All Rules Together
useAllRulesWhenTesting.description: Test all rules together or individually

simplifierRules.title: Simplifier Rules
simplifierRules.description: Rules for simplifying inline code representation
